app.title: Eco Settings Panel
app.subtitle: Manage themes, languages, app plugins, and component theme verification from one place.

themes.title: Themes
themes.summary: Install, switch, and remove theme packages

languages.title: Languages
languages.summary: Switch the active locale and validate live refresh

appPlugins.title: App Plugins
appPlugins.summary: Install, enable, disable, and remove app plugins

gallery.title: Component Gallery
gallery.summary: Preview real components with the active theme

errors.runtimeState: Failed to read Host runtime state.
errors.runtimeThemeRefresh: Failed to refresh current theme state.
errors.runtimeLocaleRefresh: Failed to refresh current locale state.
errors.themeList: Failed to load the theme list.
errors.themeInstall: Failed to install the theme package.
errors.languageList: Failed to load the language list.
errors.appPluginList: Failed to load the app plugin list.
errors.appPluginInstall: Failed to install the app plugin.
errors.appPluginToggle: Failed to update the app plugin state.
errors.appPluginUninstall: Failed to uninstall the app plugin.
errors.filePicker: Failed to open the file picker.
errors.dragPathUnavailable: This environment cannot resolve dragged file paths. Please use the file picker instead.

themes.title: Theme Management
themes.subtitle: Combine installed theme records, enabled theme collection, and the current active theme into one governance list.
themes.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, theme ID, or publisher

dropzone.title: Drop a theme package here to install
dropzone.description: Supports .cpk archives, theme directories, and manifest inputs. Host performs the installation.

empty.title: No extra themes installed yet
empty.description: Install a new theme package from the action button or drag-and-drop area.

feedback.installSuccess: The theme package was installed and the list was refreshed.

dialogs.currentThemeMessage: Switch to another theme before uninstalling the currently active one.
dialogs.currentThemeDetail: The settings panel follows the formal governance contract and does not downgrade this flow in the UI.
dialogs.uninstallDetail: Host will refresh theme runtime records immediately after removal.
dialogs.detailDescription: Review the full governance details for this theme record.

languages.title: Languages
languages.subtitle: Read installed locales from Host and refresh the UI through the formal runtime event.

empty.title: No languages available
empty.description: The Host language service did not return any switchable locales.

dialogs.detailDescription: Review the full details for this language record.

appPlugins.title: App Plugins
appPlugins.subtitle: Read Host governance records for app plugins and manage installation, enablement, disablement, and removal.
appPlugins.searchPlaceholder: Search by plugin name, plugin ID, or version

dropzone.title: Drop an app plugin package here to install
dropzone.description: Supports .cpk archives, plugin directories, and manifest inputs.

empty.title: No extra app plugins installed
empty.description: Import a new app plugin package through the formal installation entry.

selfManaged.description: The settings panel plugin cannot disable or uninstall itself from its own governance UI, so the runtime settings entry remains available.

feedback.installSuccess: The app plugin was installed and the list was refreshed.
feedback.selfManagedBlockedMessage: The settings panel plugin cannot disable or uninstall itself from its own UI.

dialogs.uninstallDetail: Host emits plugin.uninstalled immediately after removal.
dialogs.detailDescription: Review the full governance details for this app plugin record.

gallery.title: Component Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Active theme: {theme}
gallery.description: This page renders the formal Chips component library exports directly, so theme acceptance and visual regression can be verified against real components.

groupDescriptions.foundation: Validate primary actions, inputs, and short feedback states under the active theme.
groupDescriptions.forms: Cover fields, grouped forms, and long-list patterns used in everyday settings flows.
groupDescriptions.advancedData: Check how complex data entry, search, and tree structures render with the theme.
groupDescriptions.workbench: Simulate workbench layouts used when settings pages coordinate with Host tool panels.
groupDescriptions.systemUx: Verify error, loading, notification, and empty-state system experience components.

button.summary: Primary and secondary action buttons for install, switch, and confirm flows.

input.summary: Single-line text input for names, search terms, and other basic entry points.

checkbox.summary: Boolean multi-select control for additive configuration states.

radioGroup.summary: Mutually exclusive option group for mode and strategy selection.

switch.summary: Toggle control that emphasizes immediate enable and disable behavior.

select.summary: Controlled select for theme modes and policy collections.

dialog.summary: Modal surface for confirmations and installation flows.

popover.summary: Lightweight contextual layer for help text and inline explanations.

tabs.summary: Switch between multiple related views inside the same surface.

menu.summary: Contextual action list for toolbars and more-actions entry points.

tooltip.summary: Immediate helper text for icons and compact actions.

formField.summary: Shared field frame for labels, descriptions, and controls.

formGroup.summary: Compose a related batch of settings inside one semantic block.

virtualList.summary: Maintain stable rendering and scrolling for long list scenarios.

dataGrid.summary: Render structured tables such as theme tokens or plugin metadata.

tree.summary: Represent hierarchical setting structures and grouped navigation.

dateTime.summary: Handle scheduling and time-window input in a formal control.

commandPalette.summary: Global command search and quick entry for power-user workflows.

dockPanel.summary: Simulate a docked workspace with summary and log panels.

inspector.summary: Render inspector-style sections and collapsible property groups.

panelHeader.summary: Unified title, description, and action strip for page modules.

cardShell.summary: Reusable shell container for card-like acceptance scenarios.

toolWindow.summary: Simulate floating or fixed tool surfaces in the Host workspace.

errorBoundary.summary: Verify formal error fallback rendering and messaging.

loadingBoundary.summary: Verify loading placeholders and stable content transitions.

notification.summary: List-style runtime feedback suitable for settings results.

toast.summary: Transient overlay feedback for short runtime updates.

emptyState.summary: Clear guidance for scenarios without data or results.

skeleton.summary: Structural placeholders that preserve rhythm during loading.

dialog.title: Install package
dialog.description: This sample validates the dialog surface and content structure.

popover.title: Popover content
popover.description: Used for local guidance and supplemental information.

formField.label: Workspace name
formField.description: Used by the Host window title.

notification.title: Theme applied
notification.message: The active theme was updated successfully.
